title: Diagram data structure definitions
purpose: Defines the core data types for representing diagrams and their validation results in the application.
module_context: Exports two interface types: Diagram for diagram entities and DiagramValidation for validation outcomes.

steps.content: Define the structure for a diagram entity with unique identifier, name, content, and metadata.
Add optional folder path for organization.
Add optional locking status to prevent modifications.
Add optional deprecated flag to mark obsolete diagrams.
Add optional pinning status for frequently used diagrams.
Define the structure for validation results of diagram content.
Include boolean flag indicating if the diagram is valid.
Add optional error message for invalid diagrams.
Add optional line number where validation error occurred.
